title: HINMAY 7-Inch Mini Tongs with Silicone Tips Small Serving Tongs Kitchen Tongs, Set of 3 (Red Blue Green)
features: 【PROFESSIONAL & DURABLE CONSTRUCTION】Our kitchen tongs are made from extra thick stainless steel with smooth pull ring and durable spring mechanism, while remaining lightweight and easy to handle! Corrosion resistant, no discoloration or pelting of material.

【NONSTICK & HIGH HEAT RESISTANT】The tips of cooking tongs are manufactured from BPA free 100% Food Grade Silicone, won’t absorb odors or flavors; Soft Ends won’t scratch your non-stick cookware. Heat safe up to 480℉, means no more melt tips and no harmful chemicals leaking into the food.

【PACKAGE CONTENTS 】Each set comes with 3 pieces 7-Inch food serving tongs. Small tongs are wonderful for personal SERVING at the table or when do a buffet. Perfect with home-made salad, taco bars for cheese, veggies, lettuce, beans, or bacon. (Red Blue Green)

【COMFORT & ERGONOMIC DESIGN】RING-PULL LOCKING MECHANISM allows ends easy to lock together, an excellent space-saving and safety feature; Non-slip rubber coated stainless steel handle provides A SURE FIRM GRIP and control; Silicone tips are easy to clean and DISHWASHER SAFE.

【Perfect After-Sales Service】We provide 100% satisfied customer service, just to ensure that you get 7-Inch small silicone tongs set. If you have any questions, just contact us through your order. We will provide you with a 100% satisfactory solution.
description: Product Description HINMAY 7-Inch Mini Tongs with Silicone Tips, Set of 3 (Red Blue Green) Silicone Tips The soft scalloped silicone tips are safe to use on all cookware surfaces without fear of leaving a mark. Unlike traditional metal tongs, they won't damage your best non-stick or enameled cast iron pans. Heat safe up to 480 degrees. Smooth Ring Pull Locking Mechanism The smooth ring pull locking mechanism allows you to close tongs for easy storage and prevents them jamming in your utensil drawer when you go to grab them. Or hang them to keep within easy reach. Fast and Easy to Clean Made from stainless steel and food grade silicone. Tongs are hygienic, dishwasher safe and won’t absorb odors or flavors. Gift Wapper Up These 7-Inch small silicone tongs are packed in a beautifully designed box which makes the perfect gift for friends family or yourself. NOTICE 1. Please wash the small serving tongs with warm soapy water before first using in order to wash off any residue left from the manufacturing process; 2. Please clean and air dry the small silicone tongs after using for your healthy daily use, and store them in dry place for its durability; 3. You can use it in various ways, Great for taking food, vegetable, food, meat, cheese, bread, ice and more etc. mini tongs _ small tongs _ serving tongs _ kitchen tongs small _ food tongs serving _ small tongs for appetizers _ small tongs for cooking _ small serving tongs _ small silicone tong _ tongs for serving food _ mini tongs with silicone tips _ tiny tongs _ short tongs Brand: HINMAY Material: Stainless Steel and Silicone Size: 7" Handles (8.5" including lock) Weight: 3.40 OZ Heat Resistant Temperature: 480 F.
